stack.title: Decoder Stack — N sequential layers (V4-Pro: 62 = 30 CSA + 31 HCA + 1 SWA)

nodes.label:
for i in 0..N-1:
  x = layers[i](x, ...)
nodes.short_doc: Layers run sequentially. Variant per layer = config.compress_ratios[i].

nodes.label:
config.compress_ratios (V4-Pro, 62 layers):
[128,128, 4,128,4,128, ..., 4,128, 4, 0]
        ↑ ↑    └── alternating 4 ↔ 128 ──┘    ↑
        layer 0,1 dense                       last = 0
Distribution: HCA 31 · CSA 30 · SWA 1
nodes.short_doc: V4-Pro layers 0/1 are c=128 dense; layers 2..60 alternate 4/128; layer 61 is c=0 (SWA). V4-small differs (44 layers, layer 0/1 = c=0).

nodes.label:
DecoderLayer
(is_nextn=True → always MoE)
nodes.note: structure same as CSA/HCA layer; ratio per config

hc_pre.label: mHC pre (norm + gate-proj)
hc_pre.description:
Manifold-constrained Hyper-Connection prelude: per-token fused
sqrsum + RMS-norm + gate-proj (mhc_pre_big_fuse_tilelang_kernel).
sglang default is SGLANG_OPT_USE_TILELANG_MHC_PRE=True, ~3x slower
than the deep_gemm tf32 prenorm path used by vllm.

attn_qkv_proj_rope.label: Q/K/V proj + RoPE + KV cache store
attn_qkv_proj_rope.description:
Q proj, KV down/up proj, RoPE, FP8 quant, store to flash-MLA cache.
sglang fuse: rmsnorm_self + deepseek_rope_kernel + per_token_group_quant +
fused_store_flashmla_cache.

attn_output_proj.label: Attention output proj (Wo)
attn_output_proj.description:
Attention output projection. Prefill: 245 ms / iter (19.93% of total),
because cuBLAS dispatches to nvjet kernel instead of the deep_gemm fast path.

compressor_kv_score_proj.label: compressor: wkv_gate proj
compressor_kv_score_proj.description:
wkv_gate GEMM (Wkv + Wgate fused into a single ReplicatedLinear), plus the
ratio-gated flash_c128 / flash_c4 kernels.
Prefill HCA: 4.05 + 22.02 = 26.07 ms (main + indexer-embedded compressor).

sparse_mla_attn.label: sparse-MLA attention
sparse_mla_attn.description:
flash_fwd_splitkv_mla_fp8_sparse_kernel + combine.
Prefill HCA: 321 ms / iter; decode HCA: 14.5 ms.

indexer.label: C4 indexer (logits + topK)
indexer.description:
C4Indexer computes query × index_k, then top-K to produce the sparse-MLA
indices. Prefill HCA: 109 ms (python + kernel); decode HCA: 10.8 ms.

moe_dispatch_combine.label: MoE dispatch + experts + combine (DeepEP)
moe_dispatch_combine.description:
Single largest stage. Prefill: 460 ms / iter / layer-type. sglang uses
deepep + mega-moe fuse: a single kernel does dispatch + GEMM + combine.
